items.name: modern-saas-landing

items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Clean, professional SaaS landing page with hero, features grid, pricing cards, and CTA. Built with Inter font and indigo accent color.

items.name: portfolio-minimal

items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Dark, elegant portfolio page with project grid, about section, skills, timeline, and contact links. Space Grotesk typography.

items.name: agency-studio
items.title: Studio — Creative Agency
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Bold, editorial creative agency page with services list, work showcase, client logos, and marquee animation. Playfair Display serif headings.

items.name: open-doodles-style
items.title: Open Doodles Style
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Hand-drawn character illustrations in the Open Doodles style. Happy, thinking, waving, and dancing characters for playful UI designs.

items.name: minimal-textures
items.title: Minimal Textures
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Subtle background textures for modern UI. Paper grain, mesh gradients, dark noise, and dot patterns.

items.name: abstract-video-loops
items.title: Abstract Video Loops
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Short, reusable video clips for design projects. Gradient flows, particle drifts, and wave animations.

items.name: open-peeps-style
items.title: Open Peeps Style
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Diverse character illustrations in the Open Peeps mix-and-match style. 8 characters with varied skin tones, poses, and outfits for inclusive UI design.

items.name: undraw-tech
items.title: unDraw Tech
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Minimal tech illustrations for SaaS and developer products. Dashboard, code, team, upload, migration, and success states.

items.name: micro-interactions
items.title: Micro Interactions
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Pure CSS animations for loading states, feedback, and delight. 13 self-contained keyframe animations with no JavaScript.

items.name: typography-pairings
items.title: Typography Pairings
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 6 curated serif + sans-serif font combinations for modern UI. Each pairing includes Google Fonts links and usage examples.

items.name: color-palettes
items.title: Color Palettes
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 6 curated 5-color systems with CSS custom properties. Atelier Zero, Midnight SaaS, Terracotta Studio, Soft Mint, Neon Dark, Sunbleached.

items.name: ui-components
items.title: UI Components
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Self-contained HTML/CSS buttons, cards, forms, and modals. Drop-in components with modern styling and interactive states.

items.name: nav-components
items.title: Navigation Components
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Essential navigation patterns — navbar, sidebar, breadcrumbs, and tab bar. Responsive with hover and active states.

items.name: footer-components
items.title: Footer Components
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Essential footer patterns — simple, multi-column, and editorial. Responsive with social links and legal sections.

items.name: form-components
items.title: Form Components
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Input fields, textareas, selects, checkboxes, and validation states. Clean, accessible form patterns.

items.name: hero-sections
items.title: Hero Sections
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 4 hero patterns for landing pages — centered, split, gradient, and dark grid. Responsive with CTAs.

items.name: pricing-tables
items.title: Pricing Tables
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 3 pricing patterns — tiered cards, feature comparison table, and horizontal layout. Responsive with highlighted plans.

items.name: social-proof
items.title: Social Proof
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Testimonials, logo bars, stats counters, and review cards. Build trust with social proof patterns.

items.name: layout-grids
items.title: Layout Grids
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 4 responsive grid patterns — masonry, dashboard, split view, and card grid. Flexible layouts for any project.

items.name: cta-banners
items.title: CTA Banners
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 3 call-to-action patterns — gradient, minimal, and newsletter signup. Responsive with dual buttons.

items.name: open-design-landing-html
items.title: Open Design Landing
items.author: Open Design
items.description: Single-file editorial landing page. All CSS inlined. Drop one file, get a full page with warm paper aesthetic, coral accents, and editorial typography.

items.name: dashboard-admin
items.title: Dashboard — Admin Panel
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Full admin dashboard with dark sidebar, stat cards, weekly revenue chart, recent activity feed, and orders table. Space Grotesk typography.

items.name: e-commerce-browse
items.title: E-Commerce — Product Browse
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Clean e-commerce product listing page with sidebar filters, product card grid, hero banner, and pagination. Instrument Sans typography.

items.name: blog-magazine
items.title: Magazine — Blog Home
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Editorial blog homepage with featured story card, article grid, topic pills, newsletter signup. Newsreader serif typography with paper texture.

items.name: auth-pages
items.title: Authentication — Sign In / Sign Up
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Dark-themed login page with split layout, brand panel with quote, email + password form, social sign-in buttons, and tabbed auth switching.

items.name: modal-dialogs
items.title: Modal & Dialog Patterns
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 3 dialog patterns — confirmation, form modal, and info overlay. Click-triggered with backdrop blur and smooth transitions.

items.name: accordion-tabs
items.title: Accordion, Tabs & Stepper
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Interactive UI patterns: pill and line tab variants, accordion FAQ with smooth expand/collapse, and a multi-step wizard with navigation.

items.name: tables-data
items.title: Data Table Patterns
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 3 table variants — standard with search and pagination, compact inventory view, and striped transaction log. Sortable headers and status badges.

items.name: geometric-patterns
items.title: Geometric Patterns
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 6 repeating SVG geometric patterns — chevron, hexagon, dot grid, diagonal stripes, crosshatch, and triangles. For backgrounds and decorative use.

items.name: blob-shapes
items.title: Blob Shapes
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 6 organic SVG blob shapes in warm, blue, green, pink, amber, and neutral tones. Perfect for hero backgrounds, section dividers, and decorative accents.

items.name: abstract-illustrations
items.title: Abstract Illustrations
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 6 minimalist abstract SVG illustrations — floating orbs, geometric frames, fluid wave, signal bars, nested pentagon, and constellation dot pattern.

items.name: landing-app-showcase
items.title: Lumina — App Showcase Landing
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Dark-themed app landing page with hero, feature grid, testimonials, pricing, and app mockup. Inter + DM Serif Display typography.

items.name: page-404-not-found
items.title: 404 — Page Not Found
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Creative 404 error page with large serif typography, warm paper background, and contextual navigation links. Instrument Sans + Serif.

items.name: contact-page
items.title: Contact — Get in Touch
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Clean contact page with info cards, contact form with validation-ready fields, and social links. Playfair Display + Inter typography.

items.name: faq-page
items.title: FAQ — Help Center
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Help center page with search bar, category cards, expandable FAQ accordion with smooth animations, and support CTA. Outfit + Lexend typography.

items.name: notifications-toasts
items.title: Notifications & Toasts
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 4 toast notification types (success, error, info, warning) with slide-in animations and auto-dismiss, plus an inline banner variant.

items.name: loading-spinners
items.title: Loading Indicators
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 7 loading patterns: ring spinner, bouncing dots, pulse ring, bar loader, rotating dots, skeleton screen, and animated progress bar.

items.name: search-filters
items.title: Search & Filter Components
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Search bar with keyboard shortcut hint, filter chip variants, active filter tags, tag input with removable chips, and range slider.

items.name: profile-cards
items.title: Profile Cards
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 3 profile card variants: vertical with tags and actions, horizontal for side-by-side layouts, and minimal for compact grids.

items.name: gradient-meshes
items.title: Gradient Meshes
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 6 vibrant gradient backgrounds — twilight purple, pink bloom, cyan lagoon, green mint, coral sunset, and lavender. CSS gradients ready to use.

items.name: line-art-icons
items.title: Line Art Icons
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 12 essential SVG line icons on a 24×24 grid with 1.5px stroke: clock, layers, heart, target, folder, search, download, edit, bookmark, package, history, users.

items.name: team-culture
items.title: Team & Culture Page
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Warm team page with remote-first hero, company values with colored icons, 8-person team grid with avatars and bios, stat counters, and careers CTA. DM Serif Display + Inter typography.

items.name: pricing-standalone
items.title: Pricing — Standalone Page
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Full pricing page with monthly/yearly toggle, 3 tier cards with Most Popular highlight, feature comparison table, and interactive price switching. Inter typeface on dark theme.

items.name: waitlist-coming-soon
items.title: Coming Soon — Waitlist
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Pre-launch coming soon page with animated grid background, live countdown timer, email waitlist form with join button, avatar social proof showing 2,847 signups, and floating gradient orbs.

items.name: onboarding-walkthrough
items.title: Onboarding Walkthrough
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Multi-step onboarding wizard with 4-step progress indicator (numbered/steps), animated transitions, workspace setup form, use case preference selection (6 options), feature highlights, and back/skip/finish navigation.

items.name: dropdowns-menus
items.title: Dropdowns & Menus
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 4 menu patterns: click-triggered dropdown with shortcuts and dividers, two-column mega menu with sections, right-click context menu, and custom select dropdowns.

items.name: carousels-sliders
items.title: Carousels & Sliders
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 3 slider patterns: multi-card feature carousel with dot navigation and prev/next buttons, testimonial rotator with auto-play and author avatars, and tabbed content slider with 4 panels.

items.name: avatars-badges
items.title: Avatars & Badges
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Avatar sizes (sm/default/lg/xl), status indicators (online/away/DND/offline), avatar groups with overflow count, badge variants (6 colors), badge sizes, dot badges, icon badges, and number counter badges.

items.name: timeline-components
items.title: Timeline Components
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 4 timeline patterns: vertical project history with colored dots and dates, activity feed with icons and timestamps, milestone tracker with progress fill, and horizontal sprint timeline.

items.name: wave-dividers
items.title: Wave Dividers
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 6 SVG section dividers: smooth wave, sharp angle/chevron, organic curve/blob, layered hills (3 overlapping), arrow/chevron split, and rounded split. Each shown in context between colored sections with usage guide.

items.name: tech-icons
items.title: Tech Icons
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 16 SVG tech stack icons on 24×24 grid: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Vue, Svelte, Node.js, Python, Docker, Git, GitHub, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, Redis, Figma, VS Code. Organized by category (Frontend, Backend, Database, Design) with usage guide.

items.name: terms-privacy
items.title: Terms of Service & Privacy
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Legal pages with tabbed Terms of Service and Privacy Policy panels. Clean editorial layout with DM Serif Display headings, sections covering acceptance, accounts, intellectual property, data collection, cookies, and user rights.

items.name: changelog-page
items.title: Changelog — Release Notes
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Release notes page with version timeline (major/minor/patch), color-coded dots, filter pills by release type, and emoji-labelled change entries with code references. JetBrains Mono for version numbers.

items.name: status-page
items.title: System Status Page
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Service status dashboard with all-good/issues/down badge, 6 monitored services with status indicators, recent incident log with resolved/monitoring labels, and 90-day uptime history bar chart.

items.name: docs-template
items.title: Documentation Template
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Full documentation site with sticky sidebar navigation, search input, 4 grouped sections (Getting Started, Core Concepts, Guides, API Reference), breadcrumbs, table of contents, code blocks, and info/warning/tip callouts.

items.name: tooltips-popovers
items.title: Tooltips & Popovers
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Tooltips in 4 positions (top/bottom/left/right) with arrow indicators, rich tooltips with title and description on hover, keyboard shortcut tooltips on colored buttons, click-to-open notification popover with message list, profile popover card, and settings context popover.

items.name: kanban-board
items.title: Kanban Board
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 4-column kanban board (To Do, In Progress, Review, Done) with color-coded column headers, task cards with feature/bug/design/dev/docs labels, high/medium/low priority badges, avatar assignees, and sprint header with task count.

items.name: chat-messages
items.title: Chat Messages
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Real-time chat UI with incoming/outgoing message bubbles, avatar senders, code snippets in messages, file attachment preview, typing indicator with animated dots, chat input with send and attach buttons, and direct message thread sidebar with unread indicators.

items.name: calendar-widget
items.title: Calendar Widget
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Interactive calendar with month navigation (prev/next buttons, today button), 6-week grid with event dots and today highlighting, upcoming events list with color-coded bars and tags, weekly overview with event counts, and date range picker with stats cards.

items.name: charts-data-viz
items.title: Charts & Data Visualization
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: Zero-dependency HTML/CSS/SVG charts: grouped bar chart with dual series, SVG line chart with gradient area fill and data dots, conic-gradient donut chart with legend, progress bars with colored fills, and stat cards with change indicators.

items.name: social-icons
items.title: Social Media Icons
items.author: 100X Systems
items.description: 14 SVG brand icons for social media platforms on 24×24 grid: X/Twitter, GitHub, LinkedIn, Discord, Slack, YouTube, Instagram (gradient), Telegram, WhatsApp, TikTok, Reddit, Stack Overflow, Dev.to, Product Hunt, Dribbble. Brand colors, organized by category.
